pages.title: 关于
pages.text: 这里是 Delov 的个人博客。 站点当前基于 Hexo 和 Nexmoe 搭建，用来记录开发、CTF 复盘、工具使用和日常笔记。 后续可以继续补充： 自我介绍 技术栈 联系方式 友链与说明

(function () { 'use strict'; if (window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches) { return; } var canvas = document.createElement('canvas'); canvas.id = 'sakura-petals'; canvas.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); canvas.style.position = 'fixed'; canvas.style.inset = '0'; canvas.style.width = '100%'; canvas.style.height = '100%'; canvas.style.pointerEvents = 'none'; canvas.style.zIndex = '9999'; canvas.style.mixBlendMode = 'normal'; document.body.appendChild(canvas); var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); var width = 0; var height = 0; var dpr = 1; var petals = []; var maxPetals = 42; function random(min, max) { return Math.random() * (max - min) + min; } function resize() { dpr = Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio || 1, 2); width = window.innerWidth; height = window.innerHeight; canvas.width = Math.floor(width * dpr); canvas.height = Math.floor(height * dpr); ctx.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0); maxPetals = width < 640 ? 22 : 42; } function createPetal(initial) { var size = random(8, 18); return { x: random(-width * 0.1, width * 1.1), y: initial ? random(-height, height) : random(-80, -20), size: size, speedY: random(0.7, 1.8), speedX: random(-0.45, 0.85), drift: random(0.004, 0.014), phase: random(0, Math.PI * 2), rotate: random(0, Math.PI * 2), rotateSpeed: random(-0.018, 0.018), opacity: random(0.42, 0.82) }; } function resetPetal(petal) { var fresh = createPetal(false); Object.keys(fresh).forEach(function (key) { petal[key] = fresh[key]; }); } function seedPetals() { petals = []; for (var i = 0; i < maxPetals; i += 1) { petals.push(createPetal(true)); } } function drawPetal(petal) { ctx.save(); ctx.translate(petal.x, petal.y); ctx.rotate(petal.rotate); ctx.globalAlpha = petal.opacity; var s = petal.size; var gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(-s * 0.15, -s * 0.2, 0, 0, 0, s); gradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95)'); gradient.addColorStop(0.45, 'rgba(255, 190, 205, 0.9)'); gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(236, 92, 132, 0.65)'); ctx.fillStyle = gradient; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, -s * 0.62); ctx.bezierCurveTo(s * 0.72, -s * 0.46, s * 0.78, s * 0.34, 0, s * 0.76); ctx.bezierCurveTo(-s * 0.78, s * 0.34, -s * 0.72, -s * 0.46, 0, -s * 0.62); ctx.fill(); ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(214, 91, 126, 0.28)'; ctx.lineWidth = 0.7; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0, -s * 0.45); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(s * 0.08, 0, 0, s * 0.55); ctx.stroke(); ctx.restore(); } function tick() { ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height); for (var i = 0; i < petals.length; i += 1) { var petal = petals[i]; petal.phase += petal.drift; petal.x += petal.speedX + Math.sin(petal.phase) * 0.55; petal.y += petal.speedY; petal.rotate += petal.rotateSpeed; if (petal.y > height + 80 || petal.x < -100 || petal.x > width + 100) { resetPetal(petal); } drawPetal(petal); } window.requestAnimationFrame(tick); } window.addEventListener('resize', function () { resize(); seedPetals(); }); resize(); seedPetals(); window.requestAnimationFrame(tick); }());

posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment
